message: Feishu/Lark MCP servers (feishu, lark) are not configured in this environment. Only arxiv-mcp-server, google-scholar, and ssh-mcp-server are available. Cannot perform Feishu sync without these MCP servers.

Feishu/Lark MCP servers (mcp__feishu__*, mcp__lark__*) are not configured in this Claude Code environment. Available: arxiv-mcp-server, google-scholar, ssh-mcp-server. Cannot sync to Feishu without these MCP servers.

context.fix_instructions: Run: claude mcp add --scope local lark @larksuiteoapi/lark-mcp && claude mcp add --scope local feishu feishu-mcp

message: Feishu/Lark MCP servers (mcp__feishu__*, mcp__lark__*) are not configured in this Claude Code environment. Available MCP servers are: arxiv-mcp-server, google-scholar, ssh-mcp-server. Cannot perform Feishu document/bitable sync. To fix: run claude mcp add --scope local lark and feishu MCP servers.
